title: lippia morii
intro: Lippia morii, also known as the Chinese Lippia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. The plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lippia morii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. Lippia morii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
